title: Is anyone on the 12 week Taxol chemo protocol?
body: My oncologist wants me to do that. I don’t want to do chemo. I’m on ivermectin and mebendazole stage three invasive ductile carcinoma spread to lymph’s under my armpit, but not anywhere else at this time I just started at the protocol three weeks ago and I had an ultrasound and it’s grown 2 mm but I don’t know if that was before I started it or during. I haven’t been on the protocol long enough to really know of it’s working. I don’t know whether I should add the chemo like the doctor says or try to wait longer to see if this protocol will work, but I’m afraid I’m gonna miss my window when it goes to stage four and then I regret it but I’m terrified of the side effects of chemo cause I’m talking to people that have permanent side effects for the rest of their lives on this stuff and I’m really anti-chemo/radiation. I was wondering if anyone on here could share their experience if they are on it, the good bad and ugly? Thank you in advance
